description: Style Note A brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for purses. Available to you in a variety of designs at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, these bags are a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge. Product DetailsBrown bag with pleat and buckle on front Flap with zippered compartment and magnetic button closure One main zippered compartment Synthetic lining with zippered pocket Zippered compartment with branding at the back One long handle for carrying ease Materials and Care Synthetic Wipe with damp cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 23 cm Width: 23 cm Depth: 6 cm
